title: Untitled
content: Workshop on Virtual Labs: 17th November, 2017 by IIT Delhi Kindly find below the successful Completion Report about the Workshop on Virtual Labs on 17th November, 2017 at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat-173234. The Workshop was organized in two sessions. All two sessions were organized by the expert team from IIT, Delhi (Mr. Ashish Ranjan(9643358536) and Mr. Ashish Mudgil). Completion Report about the Workshop
